---
title: "Conversational AI as a Marketing Engine"
subtitle: "How support conversations become customer signals"
author: "Khyati Parihar"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: false
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<style>
:root {
  --pink: #ff4fa3;
  --deep-pink: #8a155f;
  --soft-pink: #ffd6ea;
  --light-pink: #fff0f7;
  --ink: #2b1020;
  --muted: #6b5261;
}

.reveal {
  color: var(--ink);
  font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
}

.reveal h1,
.reveal h2,
.reveal h3 {
  color: var(--deep-pink);
  letter-spacing: -0.03em;
  text-transform: none;
}

.reveal h1 { font-size: 2.4em; }
.reveal h2 { font-size: 1.65em; }
.reveal p, .reveal li { font-size: 0.82em; }

.hero {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--deep-pink), var(--pink));
  color: white;
  padding: 44px;
  border-radius: 34px;
  box-shadow: 0 20px 55px rgba(255, 79, 163, 0.26);
}

.hero h1, .hero h2, .hero p { color: white; }

.tag {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--soft-pink);
  color: var(--deep-pink);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.5em;
  margin: 8px 5px;
}

.card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 28px;
}

.card-grid.two { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
.card-grid.four { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }

.card {
  background: var(--light-pink);
  border: 2px solid var(--soft-pink);
  border-radius: 26px;
  padding: 24px;
  min-height: 145px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(138, 21, 95, 0.10);
}

.card strong {
  color: var(--deep-pink);
  font-size: 1.08em;
}

.big-number {
  font-size: 2.2em;
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--pink);
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.flow {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 34px 0;
}

.step {
  padding: 17px 24px;
  border: 2px solid var(--soft-pink);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: white;
  color: var(--deep-pink);
  font-weight: 800;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(255, 79, 163, 0.14);
}

.arrow {
  color: var(--pink);
  font-weight: 900;
  font-size: 1.25em;
}

.callout {
  margin-top: 28px;
  padding: 21px 26px;
  border-left: 8px solid var(--pink);
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: var(--light-pink);
  font-size: 0.72em;
}

.chart {
  margin: 25px auto 10px auto;
  width: 86%;
}

.bar-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 230px 1fr 46px;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin: 14px 0;
  font-size: 0.58em;
}

.bar-track {
  height: 24px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--soft-pink);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.bar-fill {
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--deep-pink), var(--pink));
}

.line-chart {
  width: 88%;
  margin: 20px auto;
  padding: 22px;
  background: var(--light-pink);
  border: 2px solid var(--soft-pink);
  border-radius: 26px;
}

.note {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.52em !important;
}

.center { text-align: center; }
</style>

## Conversational AI as a Marketing Engine {.hero}

How support conversations become customer signals  
<span class="tag">Conversational AI</span><span class="tag">Marketing Analytics</span><span class="tag">Netomi Lens</span>

---

## From chatbot to customer intelligence layer

<div class="card-grid">
<div class="card"><div class="big-number">1</div><strong>Captures intent</strong><br>What customers are trying to do.</div>
<div class="card"><div class="big-number">2</div><strong>Reduces friction</strong><br>Faster answers, fewer repeated steps.</div>
<div class="card"><div class="big-number">3</div><strong>Creates signals</strong><br>Support data becomes marketing input.</div>
</div>

<div class="callout"><strong>Main idea:</strong> customer service is not separate from marketing. It is one of the most direct brand touchpoints.</div>

---

## The simple problem

<div class="card-grid">
<div class="card"><strong>Customers move fast</strong><br><br>They expect instant answers across chat, email, social, and apps.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Brands move slower</strong><br><br>Teams often work in separate tools with limited context.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Support becomes memory</strong><br><br>A slow support experience becomes a negative brand impression.</div>
</div>

---

## What conversational AI actually does

<div class="flow">
<div class="step">Customer asks</div><div class="arrow">→</div>
<div class="step">AI detects intent</div><div class="arrow">→</div>
<div class="step">Answer or action</div><div class="arrow">→</div>
<div class="step">Human handoff</div>
</div>

<div class="callout"><strong>Important:</strong> good AI does not pretend to solve everything. It handles routine questions and escalates complex or emotional cases.</div>

---

## My Netomi lens

At Netomi, the key lesson was simple: <strong>AI support works best when it feels invisible.</strong>

<div class="card-grid">
<div class="card"><strong>Fast</strong><br><br>Resolve common questions without waiting.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Useful</strong><br><br>Connect the customer to the right answer or workflow.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Human-aware</strong><br><br>Escalate when empathy or judgment is needed.</div>
</div>

---

## From support tickets to marketing signals

<div class="chart">
<div class="bar-row"><span>Purchase intent</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:88%"></div></div><span>88</span></div>
<div class="bar-row"><span>Churn risk</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:82%"></div></div><span>82</span></div>
<div class="bar-row"><span>Product confusion</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:76%"></div></div><span>76</span></div>
<div class="bar-row"><span>Retention moment</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:72%"></div></div><span>72</span></div>
<div class="bar-row"><span>Campaign feedback</span><div class="bar-track"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:66%"></div></div><span>66</span></div>
</div>

<p class="note center">Illustrative values only: relative marketing usefulness, not measured performance.</p>

---

## A simple customer journey

<div class="flow">
<div class="step">“Where is my order?”</div><div class="arrow">→</div>
<div class="step">Delivery update</div><div class="arrow">→</div>
<div class="step">Return option</div><div class="arrow">→</div>
<div class="step">Better trust</div>
</div>

<div class="line-chart center">
<svg viewBox="0 0 760 270" width="100%" role="img" aria-label="Illustrative customer experience score rises across journey stages">
  <line x1="60" y1="220" x2="720" y2="220" stroke="#ffd6ea" stroke-width="3"/>
  <line x1="60" y1="40" x2="60" y2="220" stroke="#ffd6ea" stroke-width="3"/>
  <polyline points="80,190 235,145 390,115 545,86 700,60" fill="none" stroke="#8a155f" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <polygon points="80,190 235,145 390,115 545,86 700,60 700,220 80,220" fill="#ffd6ea" opacity="0.45"/>
  <g fill="#ff4fa3"><circle cx="80" cy="190" r="10"/><circle cx="235" cy="145" r="10"/><circle cx="390" cy="115" r="10"/><circle cx="545" cy="86" r="10"/><circle cx="700" cy="60" r="10"/></g>
  <g fill="#6b5261" font-size="24" text-anchor="middle"><text x="80" y="255">Question</text><text x="235" y="255">AI answer</text><text x="390" y="255">Action</text><text x="545" y="255">Human help</text><text x="700" y="255">Loyalty</text></g>
</svg>
</div>

---

## Why marketers should care

<div class="card-grid four">
<div class="card"><strong>Personalization</strong><br><br>Current customer need.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Retention</strong><br><br>Early frustration signals.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Product insight</strong><br><br>Repeated questions show gaps.</div>
<div class="card"><strong>Brand trust</strong><br><br>Support becomes experience.</div>
</div>

---

## Final takeaway {.hero}

The best conversational AI does not feel like AI.  
It feels <strong>fast</strong>, <strong>useful</strong>, and <strong>human</strong>.

<br>

<strong>Conversational AI turns messy customer conversations into clearer marketing decisions.</strong>
